title: lastrea africana
intro: Lastrea africana, also known as the African Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea africana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and improving digestion, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Lastrea africana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
